untranslatable_reason: Signal requires options-specific metrics (Implied Volatility, option delta, bid-ask spreads, volatility skew/slope) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators are equity price/technical indicators only. Options Greeks (delta, vega), IV term structure, and skew measurements cannot be replicated from price-based indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using available volatility proxies: india_vix as IV proxy, hvol_20 as realized volatility proxy, and bb_pct_b as proxy for extreme OTM positioning. However, this loses critical signal components: (1) delta threshold for strike selection, (2) bid-ask spread liquidity filter, (3) IV-RV spread quantification in std devs, (4) skew slope measurement. A proper implementation requires options data feeds with Greeks and IV surface.
